summary: The page scores 98/100 on performance. No high-severity issues were found.

findings.title: Speed Index
findings.description: Speed Index shows how quickly the contents of a page are visibly populated.
findings.evidence: Speed Index: 4.1 s mobile / 0.7 s desktop; budget 4.0 s

findings.title: Optimize DOM size
findings.description: A large DOM can increase the duration of style calculations and layout reflows, impacting page responsiveness.
